fields.label: Topic
fields.description: WooCommerce webhook topic, e.g. order.created. This is the event type WooCommerce fires.

fields.label: WooCommerce Webhook ID
fields.description: Webhook ID assigned by WooCommerce after registration. Used to identify the webhook for updates or deletion.

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Current webhook status. 'Never Triggered' means it was registered but no event has arrived yet. Check your ERPNext URL is publicly accessible if this persists.

fields.label: Last Triggered
fields.description: When WooCommerce last successfully fired this webhook to ERPNext. Updated automatically on each incoming webhook.

fields.label: Delivery URL
fields.description: The ERPNext endpoint URL WooCommerce posts webhook events to. Must be publicly accessible over HTTPS.
